shortDescription: Bright 2-bedroom condo in North York Centre with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 77 Sheppard Avenue East, Unit 802 in the vibrant North York Centre neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. The deep lot provides ample space for gardening, play, or future expansion. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Pot lights and designer fixtures throughout
